2026-06-19T09:27:15.7986902Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs/audit dirs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7987218Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs/audit dirs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7987385Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7987606Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+rX /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7987951Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7988084Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7988240Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7988334Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7988535Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-06-19T09:27:15.7988638Z [36;1mfi[0m
